name: noctalia-shell-wallpaper-selector
title: Noctalia Shell Wallpaper Selector
description: Simple extension to quickly change your wallpaper using the Noctalia Shell IPC for interacting with wallpapers.
author: Gimblet

commands.name: change-your-wallpaper
commands.title: Change your wallpaper
commands.subtitle: Select a new wallpaper for noctalia shell
commands.description: This command executes the Noctalia Shell IPC in order to change the user's wallpaper

preferences.name: wallpaper_directory
preferences.title: Wallpaper directory
preferences.description: Absolute path to the folder where you store your wallpapers.

preferences.name: display_name
preferences.title: Your display name
preferences.description:
Set your display name as declared in your Window Manager, this monitor will have the wallpaper changed, currently only one monitor is supported.
For example: In Hyprland run hyprctl monitors and you should see something like Monitor DP-1.
Therefore you would set DP-1.
